ESR1 alterations

2025-09-02

arm_colors <- c("arm_A" = "#4E79A7", "arm_B" = "#F28E2B")
arm_labels <- c("arm_A" = "Combination treatment arm", "arm_B" = "Monotherapy arm")

esr1_mutation_colors <- c(
    "L536P" = "#66c2a5",
    "L536H" = "#a6d854",
    "L536R" = "#8da0cb",
    "Y537N" = "#e78ac3",
    "Y537S" = "#fc8d62",
    "Y537C" = "#ffd92f",
    "D538G" = "#e5c494"
)

ESR1 mutation annotation

translate_hgvs_to_oneletter <- function(hgvs_vec) {
    aa_dict <- c(
        Ala = "A", Arg = "R", Asn = "N", Asp = "D",
        Cys = "C", Gln = "Q", Glu = "E", Gly = "G",
        His = "H", Ile = "I", Leu = "L", Lys = "K",
        Met = "M", Phe = "F", Pro = "P", Ser = "S",
        Thr = "T", Trp = "W", Tyr = "Y", Val = "V",
        Ter = "*", Stop = "*", del = "del"
    )

    hgvs_vec <- stringr::str_remove(hgvs_vec, ".*p\\.")
    hgvs_vec <- stringr::str_remove_all(hgvs_vec, "^\\(|\\)$")

    unlist(lapply(hgvs_vec, function(hgvs) {
        if (!is.na(hgvs)) {
            if (stringr::str_detect(hgvs, "fsTer")) {
                pattern <- "([A-Za-z]+)([0-9]+)([A-Za-z]+)(fsTer)([0-9]+)"
                matches <- stringr::str_match(hgvs, pattern)
                stringr::str_c(aa_dict[matches[, 2]], matches[, 3],
                               aa_dict[matches[, 4]], "_", matches[, 5], matches[, 6])
            } else {
                pattern <- "([A-Za-z]+)([0-9]+)([A-Za-z]+)"
                matches <- stringr::str_match(hgvs, pattern)
                stringr::str_c(aa_dict[matches[, 2]], matches[, 3], aa_dict[matches[, 4]])
            }
        } else {
            "splice"
        }
    }))
}
esr1_annotated <- somatic_tso500_ALL_trace_variants_paired |>
    left_join(patient_order_somatic_variants, by = join_by(patnr, arm)) |>
    filter(genename == "ESR1", varianttype == "SNV", timepoint == "PD") |>
    mutate(
        proteinchange_one_letter = translate_hgvs_to_oneletter(proteinchange),
        genelabel  = paste0(genename, "_", proteinchange_one_letter),
        aa_residue = as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(proteinchange_one_letter, "[0-9]{1,3}"))
    ) |>
    filter(aa_residue %in% c(536, 537, 538)) |>
    mutate(ccf = ifelse(is.na(ccf_BL), ccf_PD, ccf_BL))

ESR1 prevalence

n_esr1_arm_A <- esr1_annotated |> filter(arm == "arm_A") |> pull(patnr) |> n_distinct()
n_esr1_arm_B <- esr1_annotated |> filter(arm == "arm_B") |> pull(patnr) |> n_distinct()

cat("Arm A:", n_esr1_arm_A, "/", n_patients_arm_A, "patients with ESR1 LBD mutation\n")
## Arm A: 11 / 21 patients with ESR1 LBD mutation
cat("Arm B:", n_esr1_arm_B, "/", n_patients_arm_B, "patients with ESR1 LBD mutation\n")
## Arm B: 13 / 14 patients with ESR1 LBD mutation
tab <- matrix(
    c(n_esr1_arm_A, n_patients_arm_A - n_esr1_arm_A,
      n_esr1_arm_B, n_patients_arm_B - n_esr1_arm_B),
    nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE,
    dimnames = list(Arm = c("arm_A", "arm_B"), ESR1 = c("Mutated", "Not mutated"))
)
tab
##        ESR1
## Arm     Mutated Not mutated
##   arm_A      11          10
##   arm_B      13           1
fisher.test(tab)
## 
##  Fisher's Exact Test for Count Data
## 
## data:  tab
## p-value = 0.02331
## alternative hypothesis: true odds ratio is not equal to 1
## 95 percent confidence interval:
##  0.001819322 0.813162718
## sample estimates:
## odds ratio 
## 0.09022956
esr1_annotated |>
    group_by(patnr, arm) |>
    summarize(n_mutations = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    filter(n_mutations > 1) |>
    group_by(arm) |>
    summarize(n_patients_multi_esr1 = n(), .groups = "drop")
## # A tibble: 2 × 2
##   arm   n_patients_multi_esr1
##   <chr>                 <int>
## 1 arm_A                     3
## 2 arm_B                     8

ESR1 mutation distribution

esr1_ccf_heatmap <- esr1_annotated |>
    mutate(arm = factor(arm, levels = c("arm_B", "arm_A"))) |>
    ggplot(aes(
        x = reorder(patnr, patient_ordering, decreasing = TRUE),
        y = reorder(proteinchange_one_letter, aa_residue, decreasing = TRUE)
    )) +
    geom_tile(aes(fill = ccf), na.rm = TRUE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
        colours = c("#132B43", "#56B1F7"),
        values  = scales::rescale(c(0, 0.2, 1)),
        limits  = c(0, 1),
        breaks  = seq(0, 1, by = 0.25)
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(ccf, 2)), color = "white", size = 2.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
    facet_grid(~arm, scales = "free", space = "free",
               labeller = labeller(arm = arm_labels)) +
    labs(
        title = "Cancer cell fraction of ESR1 LBD mutations at progression",
        x     = "Patient ID",
        y     = "ESR1 mutation",
        fill  = "CCF"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
esr1_ccf_heatmap

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_ccf_heatmap.pdf", plot = esr1_ccf_heatmap, width = 9, height = 5)
somatic_tso500_PD_trace_variants_paired |>
    filter(genename == "ESR1", position > 152419919, position < 152419927) |>
    mutate(
        esr1_common_name = case_when(
            proteinchange == "NP_000116.2:p.(Leu536Pro)" ~ "L536P",
            proteinchange == "NP_000116.2:p.(Leu536His)" ~ "L536H",
            proteinchange == "NP_000116.2:p.(Leu536Arg)" ~ "L536R",
            proteinchange == "NP_000116.2:p.(Tyr537Asn)" ~ "Y537N",
            proteinchange == "NP_000116.2:p.(Tyr537Ser)" ~ "Y537S",
            proteinchange == "NP_000116.2:p.(Tyr537Cys)" ~ "Y537C",
            proteinchange == "NP_000116.2:p.(Asp538Gly)"  ~ "D538G"
        ),
        residue_position = as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(esr1_common_name, "[0-9]+"))
    ) |>
    ggplot(aes(
        x    = reorder(esr1_common_name, residue_position),
        y    = vaf_PD,
        fill = esr1_common_name
    )) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge2()) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.01, color = "gray", linetype = "dashed") +
    facet_wrap(~patnr) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = esr1_mutation_colors) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.15)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 0.05, 0.10, 0.15)) +
    labs(
        title = "Variant allele frequency of ESR1 LBD mutations at progression",
        y     = "VAF",
        x     = "ESR1 mutation",
        fill  = "ESR1 mutation"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_vaf_per_patient.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 6)
esr1_butterfly <- esr1_annotated |>
    group_by(arm) |>
    mutate(n_patients_with_esr1 = n_distinct(patnr)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    group_by(arm, n_patients_with_esr1, genelabel, aa_residue) |>
    summarize(n_esr1_mutation = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    mutate(
        perc       = n_esr1_mutation / n_patients_with_esr1 * 100,
        x          = ifelse(arm == "arm_A", perc, -perc),
        x_labels   = ifelse(arm == "arm_A", perc + 19, -perc - 19),
        perc_label = paste0(round(perc), "%")
    ) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_bar(
        aes(y = reorder(genelabel, aa_residue, decreasing = TRUE), x = x, fill = arm),
        stat = "identity"
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(
        y     = reorder(genelabel, aa_residue, decreasing = TRUE),
        x     = x_labels,
        label = perc_label
    )) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100)) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(-100, -50, 0, 50, 100),
        labels = c("100%", "50%", "0%", "50%", "100%")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = arm_colors, labels = arm_labels) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
    labs(
        x    = "% Patients",
        y    = "ESR1 LBD mutation",
        fill = "Treatment arm"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "none",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )
esr1_butterfly

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_butterfly_chart.pdf", plot = esr1_butterfly, width = 7, height = 5)
esr1_combined <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
    esr1_ccf_heatmap,
    esr1_butterfly + theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.y = element_blank()),
    design = "AAAAAAAAAABBB#"
)
esr1_combined

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_combined.pdf", plot = esr1_combined, width = 9, height = 5)

Subclonal analysis of patients with multiple ESR1 mutations

patients_with_multiple_esr1 <- esr1_annotated |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    summarize(n_esr1_mutations = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    filter(n_esr1_mutations > 1) |>
    pull(patnr)

esr1_depths <- esr1_annotated |>
    filter(patnr %in% patients_with_multiple_esr1) |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    summarize(depth = round(mean(depth)), .groups = "drop")

mutation_annotation <- esr1_annotated |>
    filter(patnr %in% patients_with_multiple_esr1) |>
    select(patnr, vaf_PD, ccf_PD, cn_PD, proteinchange_one_letter)

vaf_pairs <- purrr::map_dfr(patients_with_multiple_esr1, function(pat) {
    vafs <- esr1_annotated |> filter(patnr == pat) |> pull(vaf_PD)
    tidyr::expand_grid(vaf1 = vafs, vaf2 = vafs) |>
        filter(vaf1 < vaf2) |>
        distinct() |>
        mutate(patnr = pat)
}) |>
    left_join(mutation_annotation, by = join_by(patnr, vaf1 == vaf_PD)) |>
    left_join(mutation_annotation, by = join_by(patnr, vaf2 == vaf_PD),
              suffix = c("_vaf1", "_vaf2"))

patients_multi_esr1 <- vaf_pairs |>
    left_join(esr1_depths, by = join_by(patnr)) |>
    mutate(
        patnr_label = paste0(patnr, " (", proteinchange_one_letter_vaf1,
                             "-", proteinchange_one_letter_vaf2, ")"),
        vaf_mean    = (vaf1 + vaf2) / 2
    )
simulate_biallelic_ratios <- function(true_vaf, depth, n_sim = 10000) {
    obs1   <- rbinom(n_sim, depth, true_vaf) / depth
    obs2   <- rbinom(n_sim, depth, true_vaf) / depth
    ratios <- pmax(obs1, obs2) / pmin(obs1, obs2)
    ratios[is.infinite(ratios) | is.nan(ratios)] <- NA
    ratios
}

calculate_empirical_pvalue <- function(observed_ratio, true_vaf, depth, n_sim = 10000) {
    null_ratios <- simulate_biallelic_ratios(true_vaf, depth, n_sim)
    mean(null_ratios >= observed_ratio, na.rm = TRUE)
}

classify_patients <- function(df, alpha = 0.05, n_sim = 10000) {
    df |>
        mutate(ratio = pmax(vaf1, vaf2) / pmin(vaf1, vaf2)) |>
        rowwise() |>
        mutate(
            p_value       = calculate_empirical_pvalue(ratio, vaf_mean, depth, n_sim),
            p_value_label = dplyr::case_when(
                p_value < 0.001 ~ "< 0.001",
                p_value < 0.01  ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_value),
                TRUE            ~ sprintf("%.2f", p_value)
            ),
            classification = ifelse(p_value < alpha, "Likely subclonal", "Likely biallelic")
        ) |>
        ungroup()
}
set.seed(42)
results_empirical <- classify_patients(patients_multi_esr1)

results_empirical |>
    select(patnr_label, vaf1, vaf2, ratio, p_value_label, classification) |>
    arrange(p_value_label)
## # A tibble: 15 × 6
##    patnr_label         vaf1   vaf2 ratio p_value_label classification  
##    <chr>              <dbl>  <dbl> <dbl> <chr>         <chr>           
##  1 708 (D538G-Y537N) 0.0071 0.0272  3.83 0.002         Likely subclonal
##  2 306 (Y537N-D538G) 0.015  0.0245  1.63 0.06          Likely biallelic
##  3 296 (L536P-Y537N) 0.0028 0.0062  2.21 0.15          Likely biallelic
##  4 340 (Y537N-L536H) 0.0107 0.0214  2    0.15          Likely biallelic
##  5 934 (Y537N-Y537S) 0.0376 0.0476  1.27 0.32          Likely biallelic
##  6 340 (D538G-L536H) 0.0154 0.0214  1.39 0.42          Likely biallelic
##  7 340 (Y537N-D538G) 0.0107 0.0154  1.44 0.46          Likely biallelic
##  8 226 (Y537S-D538G) 0.0248 0.03    1.21 0.60          Likely biallelic
##  9 939 (Y537N-D538G) 0.0091 0.0115  1.26 0.63          Likely biallelic
## 10 520 (D538G-Y537N) 0.0072 0.0078  1.08 0.89          Likely biallelic
## 11 978 (D538G-L536P) 0.0265 0.0273  1.03 0.93          Likely biallelic
## 12 296 (L536P-D538G) 0.0028 0.056  20    < 0.001       Likely subclonal
## 13 296 (Y537N-D538G) 0.0062 0.056   9.03 < 0.001       Likely subclonal
## 14 600 (L536P-D538G) 0.0211 0.122   5.79 < 0.001       Likely subclonal
## 15 683 (D538G-Y537N) 0.0193 0.0518  2.68 < 0.001       Likely subclonal
set.seed(42)
null_data <- results_empirical |>
    rowwise() |>
    mutate(null_ratios = list(simulate_biallelic_ratios(vaf_mean, depth, n_sim = 10000))) |>
    tidyr::unnest(null_ratios) |>
    select(patnr_label, null_ratios, ratio, p_value_label, classification)

patient_cutoffs <- null_data |>
    group_by(patnr_label, ratio, p_value_label, classification) |>
    summarize(cutoff_95 = quantile(null_ratios, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot() +
    geom_histogram(
        data = null_data,
        aes(x = null_ratios, y = after_stat(density)),
        bins = 40, fill = "grey70", color = "white"
    ) +
    geom_vline(
        data = patient_cutoffs,
        aes(xintercept = cutoff_95),
        linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40"
    ) +
    geom_vline(
        data = patient_cutoffs,
        aes(xintercept = ratio, color = classification),
        linewidth = 1
    ) +
    geom_text(
        data = patient_cutoffs,
        aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = paste0("p = ", p_value_label)),
        hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.3, size = 3
    ) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("Likely subclonal" = "steelblue", "Likely biallelic" = "forestgreen")
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~patnr_label, scales = "free") +
    labs(
        title = "Null distributions for subclonality of ESR1 LBD mutations",
        x     = "VAF ratio",
        y     = "Density",
        color = ""
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        plot.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
        strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray")
    )
## Warning: Removed 10 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_bin()`).

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_null_distributions.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 6)
## Warning: Removed 10 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_bin()`).
results_empirical |>
    ggplot(aes(x = vaf1, y = vaf2, color = classification)) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
        aes(label = ifelse(classification == "Likely subclonal", patnr_label, NA)),
        size = 3, box.padding = 1, point.padding = 0.5,
        segment.color = "grey40", min.segment.length = 0,
        max.overlaps = Inf, fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("Likely subclonal" = "steelblue", "Likely biallelic" = "forestgreen")
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "VAF comparison of co-occurring ESR1 LBD mutations",
        x     = "VAF of ESR1 mutation 1",
        y     = "VAF of ESR1 mutation 2",
        color = ""
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_vaf_scatter.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 6)
bayesian_subclonal_test <- function(wt, mut1, mut2, alpha = c(1, 0.1, 0.1), n_samples = 10000) {
    posterior_alpha   <- alpha + c(wt, mut1, mut2)
    posterior_samples <- MCMCpack::rdirichlet(n_samples, posterior_alpha)
    diff_samples      <- posterior_samples[, 2] - posterior_samples[, 3]
    ci_95             <- quantile(diff_samples, c(0.025, 0.975))

    list(
        posterior1     = posterior_samples[, 1],
        posterior2     = posterior_samples[, 2],
        posterior3     = posterior_samples[, 3],
        difference     = mean(diff_samples),
        ci_lower       = ci_95[1],
        ci_upper       = ci_95[2],
        prob_dominant  = mean(diff_samples > 0),
        is_subclonal   = !dplyr::between(0, ci_95[1], ci_95[2]),
        posterior_diff = diff_samples
    )
}
set.seed(42)
results_bayesian <- vaf_pairs |>
    left_join(esr1_depths, by = join_by(patnr)) |>
    mutate(
        patnr_label = paste0(patnr, " (", proteinchange_one_letter_vaf1,
                             "-", proteinchange_one_letter_vaf2, ")"),
        count_mut1  = round(vaf1 * depth),
        count_mut2  = round(vaf2 * depth),
        count_wt    = depth - count_mut1 - count_mut2
    ) |>
    rowwise() |>
    mutate(bayes = list(bayesian_subclonal_test(count_wt, count_mut1, count_mut2))) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(
        difference     = purrr::map_dbl(bayes, "difference"),
        ci_lower       = purrr::map_dbl(bayes, "ci_lower"),
        ci_upper       = purrr::map_dbl(bayes, "ci_upper"),
        is_subclonal   = purrr::map_lgl(bayes, "is_subclonal"),
        posterior_diff = purrr::map(bayes, "posterior_diff"),
        posterior2     = purrr::map(bayes, "posterior2"),
        posterior3     = purrr::map(bayes, "posterior3"),
        p_value        = purrr::map_dbl(
            posterior_diff,
            ~ 2 * min(mean(.x >= 0), mean(.x <= 0))
        ),
        classification = ifelse(is_subclonal, "Likely subclonal", "Likely biallelic")
    )

cat("Subclonal pairs:", sum(results_bayesian$is_subclonal), "/", nrow(results_bayesian), "\n")
## Subclonal pairs: 5 / 15
results_bayesian |>
    select(patnr_label, vaf1, vaf2, difference, is_subclonal, p_value, classification) |>
    arrange(p_value)
## # A tibble: 15 × 7
##    patnr_label        vaf1   vaf2 difference is_subclonal p_value classification
##    <chr>             <dbl>  <dbl>      <dbl> <lgl>          <dbl> <chr>         
##  1 296 (L536P-D538… 0.0028 0.056   -0.0528   TRUE          0      Likely subclo…
##  2 296 (Y537N-D538… 0.0062 0.056   -0.0495   TRUE          0      Likely subclo…

##  4 683 (D538G-Y537… 0.0193 0.0518  -0.0329   TRUE          0      Likely subclo…
##  5 708 (D538G-Y537… 0.0071 0.0272  -0.0202   TRUE          0.0002 Likely subclo…
##  6 306 (Y537N-D538… 0.015  0.0245  -0.00941  FALSE         0.0604 Likely bialle…
##  7 340 (Y537N-L536… 0.0107 0.0214  -0.0108   FALSE         0.113  Likely bialle…
##  8 296 (L536P-Y537… 0.0028 0.0062  -0.00336  FALSE         0.130  Likely bialle…
##  9 934 (Y537N-Y537… 0.0376 0.0476  -0.0100   FALSE         0.324  Likely bialle…
## 10 340 (D538G-L536… 0.0154 0.0214  -0.00604  FALSE         0.410  Likely bialle…
## 11 340 (Y537N-D538… 0.0107 0.0154  -0.00453  FALSE         0.466  Likely bialle…
## 12 226 (Y537S-D538… 0.0248 0.03    -0.00534  FALSE         0.588  Likely bialle…
## 13 939 (Y537N-D538… 0.0091 0.0115  -0.00232  FALSE         0.628  Likely bialle…
## 14 520 (D538G-Y537… 0.0072 0.0078  -0.000723 FALSE         0.835  Likely bialle…
## 15 978 (D538G-L536… 0.0265 0.0273  -0.000885 FALSE         0.900  Likely bialle…
results_bayesian |>
    select(patnr_label, posterior2, posterior3) |>
    tidyr::unnest(c(posterior2, posterior3)) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(
        cols      = c(posterior2, posterior3),
        names_to  = "mutation",
        values_to = "posterior_prob"
    ) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = posterior_prob, fill = mutation)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
    facet_wrap(~patnr_label, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c(posterior2 = "steelblue", posterior3 = "#D62728"),
        labels = c(posterior2 = "ESR1 LBD mutation 1", posterior3 = "ESR1 LBD mutation 2"),
        name   = ""
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "Posterior distributions of ESR1 LBD mutation prevalences",
        x     = "Posterior probability",
        y     = "Density"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.text.y      = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_posterior_density.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)
# Reshape results_bayesian: each pair row contributes 2 mutation posteriors.
# Deduplicate to one posterior per (patnr, mutation), then rank by descending VAF
# so mut1 = highest VAF, mut2 = next, mut3 = lowest.
posteriors_long <- dplyr::bind_rows(
    results_bayesian |>
        select(patnr,
               mutation  = proteinchange_one_letter_vaf1,
               vaf       = vaf1,
               posterior = posterior2),
    results_bayesian |>
        select(patnr,
               mutation  = proteinchange_one_letter_vaf2,
               vaf       = vaf2,
               posterior = posterior3)
) |>
    distinct(patnr, mutation, vaf, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
    arrange(patnr, desc(vaf)) |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    mutate(mut_rank = row_number()) |>
    ungroup()

patient_facet_labels <- posteriors_long |>
    arrange(patnr, mut_rank) |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    summarize(
        facet_label = paste0(unique(patnr), " (", paste(mutation, collapse = "-"), ")"),
        .groups    = "drop"
    )

posteriors_long |>
    left_join(patient_facet_labels, by = join_by(patnr)) |>
    tidyr::unnest(posterior) |>
    mutate(mut_rank = as.character(mut_rank)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = posterior, fill = mut_rank)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
    facet_wrap(~facet_label, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values = c("1" = "steelblue", "2" = "#D62728", "3" = "#2CA02C"),
        labels = c("1" = "ESR1 LBD mutation 1", "2" = "ESR1 LBD mutation 2", "3" = "ESR1 LBD mutation 3"),
        name   = "",
        drop   = TRUE
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "Posterior distributions of ESR1 LBD mutation prevalences",
        x     = "Posterior probability",
        y     = "Density"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
        axis.text.y      = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 8)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_posterior_density_per_patient.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 5)
results_bayesian |>
    select(patnr_label, posterior_diff) |>
    tidyr::unnest(posterior_diff) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = posterior_diff)) +
    geom_density(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    facet_wrap(~patnr_label, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
        title = "Posterior difference distributions for ESR1 subclonal analysis",
        x     = "Posterior difference (mutation 1 − mutation 2)",
        y     = "Density"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_posterior_difference.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 5)
## Warning in grid.Call.graphics(C_text, as.graphicsAnnot(x$label), x$x, x$y, :
## for 'Posterior difference (mutation 1 − mutation 2)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': -
## substituted for − (U+2212)
results_bayesian |>
    ggplot(aes(x = ccf_PD_vaf1, y = ccf_PD_vaf2, color = classification)) +
    geom_abline(intercept = 0, slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
        aes(label = ifelse(is_subclonal, patnr_label, NA)),
        size = 3.5, box.padding = 1, point.padding = 0.5,
        segment.color = "grey40", min.segment.length = 0,
        max.overlaps = Inf, fill = "white", show.legend = FALSE, na.rm = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c("Likely subclonal" = "steelblue", "Likely biallelic" = "forestgreen")
    ) +
    labs(
        title = "Bayesian analysis of co-occurring ESR1 LBD mutations",
        x     = "CCF of ESR1 mutation 1",
        y     = "CCF of ESR1 mutation 2",
        color = ""
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
    )

ggsave("results/figures/esr1_alterations_ccf_scatter_bayesian.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 6)
